include_subdomains.risk: Full subdomain inventory could not be enumerated (only www verified; config declares no known subdomains, but future subdomains — e.g. mail or panel hosts — would be force-pinned to HTTPS). Host-only success is not evidence of subdomain safety.
pending_requirements: Authoritative DNS zone inventory from the Hostinger panel
HTTPS verification of every discovered subdomain
Separate approval and its own task (TASK-0012) after basic HSTS has been stable in production

preload.risk: Preload requires includeSubDomains (not approved), max-age >= 31536000 site-wide and near-irreversible browser-list persistence. Not a candidate in configuration and operationally premature.
pending_requirements: Verification of current hstspreload.org criteria at decision time
Explicit organizational acknowledgement of the persistence commitment

exact_recommended_action: In DOCS/demo-caminodeldharma/.htaccess line 103, replace `# Header always set Strict-Transport-Security "max-age=31536000"` with `Header always set Strict-Transport-Security "max-age=31536000"` and deploy. No other directive changes.
validation_steps: curl -sS -D - -o /dev/null https://caminodeldharma.org/ | grep -i strict-transport-security  → exactly max-age=31536000
curl -sS -D - -o /dev/null http://caminodeldharma.org/ → 301 to HTTPS unchanged (header over HTTP is ignored by browsers; its presence there is tolerable, its absence preferable)
Full navigation smoke test of all 13 pages over HTTPS
Confirm certificate expiry monitoring exists (cert valid to 2026-10-12)
rollback_constraints: Never roll back by simply removing the header: serve Strict-Transport-Security "max-age=0" over valid HTTPS so pinned browsers unlearn the policy on their next visit
Rollback requires working TLS; a certificate outage while HSTS is pinned locks out returning visitors until TLS is restored — certificate renewal must be monitored
Cached policy persists up to 1 year in browsers that do not revisit after a max-age=0 rollback
residual_risks: Certificate renewal history could not be verified via CT logs (crt.sh 502, EVID-0030); reliance on Hostinger-managed Let's Encrypt renewal is INFERRED from the freshly issued certificate (2026-07-14)
DNS AAAA/NS records not enumerable from the audit environment (resolver timeouts, EVID-0003); no indication of additional hostnames in any observed configuration
